title: Two architectural slabs separated by a single precise aperture show that invalid paths are structurally absent — the material has no other opening, so nothing can pass except through the one governed threshold. The bright centerline is the rule itself.
conceptualBridge: The threshold means governed access because the contract contains exactly one allowed opening and no accidental alternatives.
decision: Removed: avg 3.5 below the 4.0 threshold and fully superseded by stronger structural-opening candidates in the set.
